description_long: This is a classic upright arcade game cabinet, featuring a prominent rectangular display area with a 'PAC-MAN' marquee at the top. The front panel showcases a vibrant game screen with pixelated characters, including Pac-Man and ghosts, and the words 'GAME OVER' in bold, retro font. Below the screen is a control panel equipped with two joysticks and multiple colored buttons, designed for player interaction. The cabinet is predominantly black with white trim, and the side panels are decorated with colorful retro stripes and the words 'RETRO ARCADE' in a stylized font. The lower front section includes a coin door, typical of arcade machines, and the overall structure is boxy with a slanted upper section for the display. The materials appear to be a combination of wood, plastic, and metal, with a glass or acrylic screen cover.
description: A classic upright Pac-Man arcade cabinet with a retro-themed design, colorful side graphics, and a control panel featuring joysticks and buttons.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Pac-Man marquee, game screen, control panel with joysticks and buttons, and coin door.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the 'RETRO ARCADE' graphics and colorful stripes on the side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, solid black back panel with no visible features or graphics.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with 'RETRO ARCADE' graphics and colorful stripes visible.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, curved, medium-sized with a visible bezel around the display area
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two joysticks and multiple colored buttons arranged for two-player side-by-side play, with a dark panel and colored button scheme
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the 'PAC-MAN' logo in yellow with a black background and orange border, styled in a retro arcade theme
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Side panels display 'RETRO ARCADE' text with colorful, diagonal retro stripes in orange, yellow, and blue
